content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 WARN — RatingGateView.swift:22-27 routes ≥4-star users to a direct `itms-apps://...write-review` link while diverting unhappy users to a private feedback form, and description.txt says "rate us 5 stars!"
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits review gating — you cannot filter by sentiment to steer only happy users to the App Store while suppressing negative reviews, and you must use `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview` rather than a hardcoded write-review URL. Here the star gate at :21 sends 4-5 stars to `itms-apps://...action=write-review` and everyone else to `fitpulse.example/feedback`, which is a textbook 5.6.1 dark pattern; the "rate us 5 stars!" copy compounds it under 5.6.3. Replace the gate with the neutral system `requestReview` API and remove the star-rating solicitation from the description.
